subject: [PATCH v2 1/4] mm: page_alloc: __GFP_FS lockdep annotation for direct compaction

2026-07-22.patch_summary: This patch adds lockdep annotations to the direct compaction function in the Linux kernel's page allocation code, specifically for __GFP_FS passing errors. This is done to prevent potential issues when compaction enters filesystem paths and to future-proof against unexpected behavior. The annotation is similar to one already present in direct reclaim code, which is often used in conjunction with compaction.
